errorTitle.defaultMessage: {errorType, select, access_denied {Access Denied} session_establishment_failed {Session Establishment Failed} invalid_state {Invalid State} server_error {Server Error} other {Authentication Error}}

errorDescription.defaultMessage: {errorType, select, access_denied {You cancelled the authentication process or denied access to your account.} session_establishment_failed {We could not establish your session after authentication. This might be a temporary issue. Please try logging in again.} invalid_state {The authentication state is invalid or expired. This might happen if you took too long to complete the login process.} server_error {An error occurred on the authentication server. Please try again later.} other {An unexpected error occurred during authentication.}}
